title: Crispy Herbal Syrian Eggplant Tart
description: A fragrant, grillcooked tart featuring thinly sliced eggplant, a herbaceous tomato filling, and a readyrolled shortcrust pastry.

ingredients.name: ready rolled shortcrust pastry
ingredients.notes: use pre‑made shortcrust pastry, rolled out to 1 cm thickness

instructions: Brush the eggplant slices with 1 Tbsp of olive oil and season with salt and pepper; grill for 3–4 min on each side until lightly charred and tender.
Meanwhile, heat the remaining 1 Tbsp olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.

Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 min. Add the minced garlic and cook for 30 s. Stir in the diced tomato, cooking until softened, about 3 min. Add chopped parsley, mint, ½ Tbsp za’atar, lemon zest, remaining salt, pepper, and ½ Tbsp za’atar; cook for 1 min, then remove from heat.
Let the filling cool slightly so it doesn’t melt the pastry.
Place the pastry sheet on a lightly oiled grill pan or a sheet of parchment on the grill. Spread the tomato‑herb filling evenly over the pastry, leaving a 1 cm border.
Close the edges of the pastry to form a loose enclosure, or simply leave it open and grill the pastry for 5–7 min, turning once, until golden and crisp.
Remove the tart from the grill, let cool for 5 min, then cut into wedges and serve warm.
